opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Please help — my husband can't stop having explosive, watery diarrhoea, more than ten times today, his stomach is cramping non-stop and he nearly collapsed trying to get to the toilet. He's completely wiped out and can't keep any fluids down. (spouse calling on his behalf)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's got dramatically worse over the last two days and now he's too weak and dizzy to stand — we didn't think it could wait until the morning.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 days ago it started with an itchy red rash, then around 2 days ago the watery diarrhoea began
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days, sharply worse over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: explosive watery diarrhoea, more than 10 times today, with constant diffuse tummy cramping; no blood seen in it
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst he's felt — completely drained, stuck in bed, nearly fainting when he tries to stand
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: cramps all across the tummy; weakness through the whole body
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse, not settling
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — lying down helps the dizziness a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes him very dizzy, and trying to drink makes the nausea and cramps worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: itchy red rash on the trunk, feeling sick, unable to keep fluids down, feeling faint and shaky
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, too weak and dizzy to walk to the bathroom safely

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: melanoma (a skin cancer) that has spread
past_medical_history.how_managed: on a cancer immunotherapy drip under the oncology team

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: cancer immunotherapy infusion (a checkpoint-inhibitor drip for the melanoma)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home with his spouse, who is present and made the call; denies eating any unusual foods and no recent travel

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: heart rate around 120 on his smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single wearable reading while unwell and moving

objective_data_offered.value: looks very pale and exhausted with sunken eyes and dry lips; a faint blotchy red rash visible on the trunk
he went grey and nearly fainted when he stood up, and is too weak to stand; the commode is full of clear watery stool with no blood in it
more than 10 watery bowel motions today and can't keep any fluids down because of the nausea
